summary: Plan-only inventory classification. No merge is recommended because every PR is missing complete merge preflight; #93384 has a concrete contributor-branch repair path, while #92591, #92610, #93293, and #93388 require maintainer or author decision before finalization.

actions.reason: Keep the issue linked to the candidate fix; do not close before a landed/validated fix path.
Related to #93384 but broader than the PR; no duplicate closeout is safe.
Active author follow-up plus unresolved review finding makes takeover or merge a maintainer decision.
The code delta is broad enough for maintainer review, and merge preflight is incomplete.
Looks like a viable candidate fix, but merge needs maintainer review and complete merge preflight.
Keep linked to the candidate fix until #93384 is repaired and validated.
Repair the contributor branch, clear failing checks, rebase/refactor narrowly if needed, then run merge preflight.
Provider/default compatibility and broad multi-surface changes need maintainer or author resolution before repair or merge.

needs_human: #92591: active author follow-up plus unresolved config metadata/docs review finding.
#92610: large session usage delta requires maintainer review and complete merge preflight.
